Summary: You’re new in Garden View, and unfortunately, you already don’t like it very much. While trying to find a place away from all the bright lights, you run into Shrimpo.

This is a remake of a now private Shrimpo bot of mine because some people had issues with stuff that wasn’t even a problem. Same thing, just got rid of a scenario. I do not care what you do with this one.
